subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.2
question_html:
What is the sum of the integer coefficients when propene undergoes complete combustion?

__C3H6 (g) + __O2 (g) → __CO2 (g) + __H2O (l)

A. 11

B. 17

C. 21

D. 23
examiners_html: 93 % of the candidates balanced the equation for the combustion of propene and obtained the sum of the integer coefficients.
